summary: P0 CFDI Matching and P1 Reconciliation Validation features tested successfully. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All UI features working correctly.

P0_match_cfdi_endpoint.description: GET /api/bank-transactions/{id}/match-cfdi returns CFDI candidates with confidence scores
P0_match_cfdi_endpoint.notes: Endpoint correctly calculates match scores based on amount similarity, date proximity, currency match, and UUID presence in description

P0_batch_create_payments.description: POST /api/bank-transactions/batch-create-payments creates payments in batch with auto-detection
P0_batch_create_payments.notes: Endpoint correctly creates payments from bank transactions, auto-detects matching CFDIs within ±60 days and ±10% amount tolerance

P1_reconciliation_validation.description: POST /api/reconciliations rejects reconciliations when no payment exists for CFDI
P1_reconciliation_validation.error_message: No se puede conciliar con este CFDI porque no existe un registro de pago/cobro asociado. Primero registra el pago/cobro en el módulo 'Cobranza y Pagos' y luego intenta conciliar.
P1_reconciliation_validation.notes: Validation correctly prevents orphan reconciliations without payment records

frontend_desde_banco_dialog.description: Frontend 'Desde Banco' dialog shows auto-matching info and processes movements correctly

seed_data_creation: Test payment created during batch-create-payments test (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 CFDI Matching and P1 Reconciliation Validation features are fully implemented and working. The match-cfdi endpoint uses ±60 days tolerance and ±10% amount tolerance. Auto-link is recommended when score >= 60. Reconciliation validation prevents creating reconciliations without existing payment records.
